title: Code-aligned deidentified analytic data for Healthy Heart Project Turner syndrome aortic QC and regression analyses
description: Deidentified analytic datasets aligned to the companion public code archive for longitudinal aortic diameter quality control, best-model slope estimation, regression analyses, and supplemental figure reproduction. Exact dates, names, raw identifiers, and linking logs are excluded.
notes: Use DATA_USE_TERMS.md for no-reidentification terms. Replace placeholders after Zenodo deposition.
